checks.name: worker process authority
checks.summary: The model process has no scheduler, approval, database, Forja control, proxy, or caller Git credential environment and executes in its own cancellable process group.

checks.name: filesystem scope integrity
checks.summary: Write scopes and evidence roots must be pre-created real directories at matching logical and resolved positions; hidden Git index state and out-of-scope or ignored mutations fail closed.

checks.name: report and evidence integrity
checks.summary: Strict schemas, exact observed-path equality, scope checks, regular-file checks, size bounds, and SHA-256 verification prevent model-authored success claims from becoming authority.

checks.name: failed-worktree quarantine
checks.summary: A failed attempt with changed or unverifiable worktree state becomes terminal, loses report authority, cannot retry, and leaves bytes intact for Sprint 05 leased disposal.

checks.name: fenced durable attempt lifecycle
checks.summary: Every attempt mutation is tenant- and repository-scoped, version-checked, idempotent, protected by a live scheduler fence, and committed with append-only event and outbox evidence.

residual_risks: Sprint 04 is an integrity boundary, not a production confidentiality sandbox; workers require a dedicated disposable host until separate-identity containment and credential brokerage close the Sprint 12 gate.
Sprint 04 preserves contaminated worktrees but intentionally does not automate their disposal or replacement; Sprint 05 owns that operation under an exclusive lease.
Network egress control and remote container isolation are deployment responsibilities outside this Sprint.
